message:
feat(ui): Add markdown rendering module for terminal output

Add rch/src/ui/markdown.rs with pulldown-cmark for parsing:
- render_markdown(): Styled terminal output with headings, bold/italic,
  lists (ordered/unordered), inline code, code blocks, horizontal rules
- strip_markdown(): Plain text output for non-TTY environments
- Configurable colors_enabled and unicode_enabled flags
- 18 unit tests covering all features

Implements remote_compilation_helper-4te (markdown rendering for help text).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
